name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the BUTTER FLAVOR CRISCO and sugar in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer. Beat in the egg and vanilla.
2. Combine the flour with baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt. Blend into the creamed mixture. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to an 1/8 inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes with cookie cutters. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 6-7 minutes. Cool on the baking sheets for about 1 minute before removing to cooling racks.
Makes approximately 5-6 dozen cookies.
NOTE: For holidays, cut the dough into desired holiday shapes. Sprinkle with colored sugar crystals before baking.
